creator: thomas.dreibholz@gmail.com
text:
Created attachment 206529
The shar file

The package hipercontracer has been missing in the FreeBSD ports. Therefore, I have created a port.

High-Performance Connectivity Tracer (HiPerConTracer) is a ping/traceroute service. It performs regular ping and traceroute runs among sites and can export the results into an SQL or Non-SQL database. 

Homepage of hipercontracer: https://www.uni-due.de/~be0001/hipercontracer/

Fix: The shar file hipercontracer-1.4.6.shar is attached.
